implemented.name: doctor
implemented.description: Validate the public LLVS core, registry and optional local dependencies.

implemented.name: capabilities
implemented.description: Return the machine-readable implemented and planned capability set.

implemented.name: feedback.local
implemented.description: Write a redacted local JSON feedback record without external publication.

implemented.name: feedback.github
implemented.description: Publish allowlisted metadata only after explicit authorization; public repositories require -AllowPublic.

implemented.name: design-evidence.readonly
implemented.description: Deterministic read-only inspection, snapshots, diffs, impact analysis, catalogs and retention evidence gates for registered local design documents.
